_meta.description: ILLUSTRATIVE SAMPLE internal pricing rules for a fictional company. All rates, wage bands, burden components, overhead, and margins are invented for demonstration. Copy to data/internal_pricing_rules.json and replace with your own confidential cost model to run the system. Real cost data should NEVER be committed to version control.

_usage_notes_for_agents.rates_are_ceilings: labor_catalog ceiling rates are the approved CEILING, not a commitment. Bid rate must be <= ceiling.
_usage_notes_for_agents.h_m_l_methodology: For each bid, produce three risk-adjusted price points (Low/Medium/High) from the same labor estimate with different burden/margin/contingency assumptions.
_usage_notes_for_agents.ga_treatment: Office overhead is a SEPARATE G&A pool — do not fold into the per-FTE wrap rate.
_usage_notes_for_agents.wage_band_extrapolation: Bands marked validated=false are extrapolated; flag them in review output.

_education_substitution_rule: Sample rule: 4 additional years of experience may substitute for a bachelor's degree.
_labor_escalation_note: Sample 3% annual escalation applied to option years.
_multi_year_pricing_default: Escalate base labor by default_annual_labor_escalation_rate per option year unless the RFP specifies otherwise.

wrap_rate_formula._description: SAMPLE wrap-rate model. Numbers are invented placeholders.
wrap_rate_formula.validation: Sample formula — validate against a real bid before use.

ga_overhead.allocation_method: Divide annual G&A pool by (avg_headcount_during_pop * annual_billable_hours) to get a per-hour add-on.
_allocation_notes: Sample allocation. avg_headcount_during_pop is company-wide, not just project FTEs.

scenario_definitions._methodology: Same labor estimate, three burden/margin/contingency profiles.

profit_policy.below_floor_action: Flag for human review before submission.
